source: Plan 14-06 hand-calc; Santa Clara CA SFH @ $1,850,000 with $28,000/mo household at 20% DP; $1,480,000 loan_amount exceeds Santa Clara conforming high-cost limit $1,249,125 (data/reference/conforming-limits-2026.yml) AND FHA high-cost ceiling $1,249,125 (data/reference/fha-limits-2026.yml) → Conv30/Conv15 blocked by FHFA-LIMIT-CONFORMING, FHA30 blocked by HUD-LIMIT-CEILING-EXCEEDED, Jumbo30 row materializes as the 4th program but is blocked at preferred 20% DP by DTI-CAP-JUMBO (dti_back=0.442426 > Jumbo ceiling 0.43 per _DTI_CEILING_BY_PROGRAM). Verdict cascade Level 2 NO_GO NO-ELIGIBLE-AT-PREFERRED-DP fires because zero programs are eligible at 20% DP while at least one DP slot (25%) keeps Jumbo30 eligible so Level 1 does not match.
notes: Cascade level 2 (NO_GO NO-ELIGIBLE-AT-PREFERRED-DP) per lib.property_verdict.synthesize: at preferred 20% DP zero programs are eligible — Conv30/Conv15 blocked by FHFA-LIMIT-CONFORMING-06-085 (financed $1,480,000 > Santa Clara county high-cost limit $1,249,125), FHA30 blocked by HUD-LIMIT-CEILING-EXCEEDED (FHA county ceiling exceeded), and Jumbo30 blocked by DTI-CAP-JUMBO because dti_back=(11387.94 + 1000) / 28000 = 0.442426 exceeds the per-program Jumbo ceiling 0.43 (CFPB ATR/QM safe harbor for non-QM jumbo; see lib/property_analysis.py:_DTI_CEILING_BY_PROGRAM). Level 1 does not match because Jumbo30 IS eligible at 25% DP (loan=$1,387,500 keeps PITI under the 0.43 ceiling). Hand-calc anchors at preferred 20% DP via lib.amortize.build_schedule on $1,480,000 principal @ 6.5%/30yr (fixed; Jumbo30 maps to loan_type='fixed' in _make_cell_loan and _build_program_result) → monthly_pi=$9354.61. PITI Jumbo30 = 9354.61 + (22000/12=1833.33) + (2400/12=200.00) + 0 (HOA) + 0 (no PMI at 80% LTV) = $11,387.94 (Pitfall 6 quantize-once). Tax block builds nothing at preferred DP (no eligible cells), so first_year_interest_per_program and over_750k_cap_per_program are empty maps; qualified_loan_limit still echoes $750,000 (mfj filing). 24 cells = 4 programs × 6 DPs (D-14-MATRIX-03 jumbo-row materialization).

_meta.citation: ANLZ-01 + ANLZ-02 + ANLZ-03 + VERD-01: covers D-14-MATRIX-03 (Jumbo30 5th-row materialization on price > conforming), D-14-MATRIX-02 (Conv/FHA cells present-but-ineligible with populated numerics per ANLZ-02), ANLZ-03 (auxiliary blocks at preferred DP — tax block over_750k flag fires), and VERD-01 cascade Level 3 (D-14-VERDICT-02 income-shock falsifiable predicate).

verdict.headline_reason: No program qualifies at preferred DP 0.200000

blocker_reasons: HUD-LIMIT-CEILING-EXCEEDED: loan_amount 1480000.00 exceeds FHA county ceiling 1249125 for Santa Clara; loans above the FHA ceiling are not eligible for the FHA program (consider conventional jumbo)
